title: Voxelprint's Desert
description: Adds content to vanilla deserts, desert caves and more!
body:
**Spice up your deserts with this mod!**
### Content
#### New Types of Sand
  - Coarse Sand
  - Soft Sand - Foliage grows on top of it over time if not covered.
  - Salty Sand - Found near sea level, when near water converted to Soft Sand.
#### New Building Blocks
  - Temple Gemstone Blocks, Stairs, Slabs, Fences, Walls
  - Temple Bricks Blocks, Stairs, Slabs, Fences, Walls
  - Temple Tiles Blocks, Stairs, Slabs, Fences, Walls
  - Temple Bookshelves
#### Palm Trees 
  - Generate near the sea or oases.
  - Palm Wood, Logs, Planks, Leaves, Stairs, Fences, Gates, Pressure Plates, Buttons
  - Can be replanted with Palm Saplings.
#### Generation
  - Desert Caves
  - Small/Big/Huge Oases
  - Underground Temples
#### Foliage
  - Desert Bones - Generate on top of salty sand.
  - Desert Ribs - Generate on top of salty sand.
  - Foxtail Agave - Grows on top of Soft Sand.
  - Jumping Cholla - Grows on top of Soft Sand.
#### Mobs
  - Ominous Crawler - Spider-like creature that hunts at night.
#### Items
  - Ominous Shell - Dropped by Crawlers.
  - Ominous Blade - Crafted by using a shell on a golden blade in the smithing table.
  - Scarab Tablet
  - Scarab Blade
  - Novawarth
  - Scarab Pickaxe
  - Luxfractin
  - 4 Ender Pearl Types
#### Music
  - One Music Disc obtained by fixing disc 11 with ominous shells.
  - Ambiance Track for Desert Caverns
#### Ambiance
  - Desert gets foggy during rain/thunder.

**Hope you enjoy!**
